# AION Voice Receptionist

> AI phone receptionist that answers business calls 24/7, texts back missed calls instantly, and captures every lead automatically. $89/month flat — no per-call fee, no customer cap. Built for small businesses in dental, real estate, home services, law, salons, and medical clinics across the US, UK, Canada, and Australia.

## Product
- [Pricing & live demo](https://global-engenharia.com/ecosystem/callreception): $89/mo Starter (300 min included, $0.15/min after), $179/mo Growth (2 lines, 750 min), $59/mo per line Agency Partner (white-label, min. 5 lines).
- [Get started](https://global-engenharia.com/get-started.html): self-service setup, live in under 20 minutes, no developer needed.
